message:
fix: YAML config prefix takes precedence over DB in shared-server mode (GH#2469)

In shared-server mode, the DB issue_prefix belongs to whichever project
initialized first. This caused all projects sharing a server to use the
wrong prefix for issue creation, ID generation, and imports.

Fix: YAML config.yaml issue-prefix now takes precedence over the DB value
in create.go, github.go, gitlab.go, linear.go, orphans.go, and merge_slot.go
(which already had the correct pattern).

Also: EnsureRunning() now calls KillStaleServers() before starting a new
server, cleaning up orphaned dolt sql-server processes that accumulate when
parent processes crash without graceful shutdown (GH#2372).

Also: add cross-project data isolation tests (5 tests covering read isolation,
port collision, same-prefix isolation, concurrent writes, and concurrent
read-write mix). Based on tests by @PabloLION (PR #2472).

Co-Authored-By: PabloLION <dev@pablolion.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
